mapper.sql: SELECT d.datasource_id AS id, d.owner_user_id AS userId, d.name AS name, d.type AS type, d.config_json AS config, u.user_name AS userName, d.created_at AS createTime, d.updated_at AS updateTime FROM ib_datasource d LEFT JOIN ib_user u ON u.user_id = d.owner_user_id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ib_datasource (owner_user_id, name, type, config_json) VALUES (#{userId}, #{name}, #{type}, #{config})
mapper.update: UPDATE ib_datasource SET name = #{name}, type = #{type}, config_json = #{config}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE datasource_id = #{id}
